## Verification

- [ ] Typecheck passes
- [ ] Tests pass
- [ ] Production build passes
- [ ] Deterministic or domain tests added where applicable
- [ ] Visual/browser check completed where applicable
- [ ] Keyboard/controller/touch boundaries checked where applicable
- [ ] Save migration or backward compatibility considered

## Arcade gate

- [ ] Improves at least three of: feel, fantasy, clarity, replayability
- [ ] Does not block the first playable loop
- [ ] Common player action remains understandable without documentation
- [ ] Advanced detail is progressively disclosed
- [ ] No duplicate state model or competing source of truth introduced
